summary: Read-only plan from the hydrated preflight artifact. #92452 remains the live representative for the ClawHub msteams provenance mismatch, but #92452, #92516, and linked #76433 are security-sensitive trust-boundary items and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling. #92516 is related but distinct from #92452, so no duplicate closeout is planned.
